Here is the list of signs with their scores and descriptions:
1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural leader, but can be impulsive and impatient.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Practical and reliable, but can be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Curious and adaptable, but can be forgetful and restless.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Nurturing and emotional, but can be moody and overly attached.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be prideful and domineering.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but can be perfectionistic and critical.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and social, but can be indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, but can be secretive and controlling.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but can be blunt and tactless.
10. Capricorn - 8/10 - Disciplined and responsible, but can be pessimistic and overly serious.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but can be aloof and unpredictable.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Compassionate and imaginative, but can be dreamy and unrealistic.
